author: ryan.mitchell
body: The Module 3 timing runs long for me with a full cohort. Has anyone split the loss activity across two sessions? Considering it for my fall group.

author: marie.dawson
body: Yes, several trainers split it. We're adding an optional two-session pacing note in the next revision — thanks Ryan.

author: ryan.mitchell
body: The grounding exercises here are excellent. Used the breathing one before the abuse-dynamics segment and the room settled noticeably.

author: patrice.nolan
body: Is the contact-hours requirement here current for Maryland? Want to confirm before I cite it for my cohort roster.

author: andre.collins
body: Kinship caregivers often miss the first session — added a note on flexible make-up options. Feedback welcome.

author: ryan.mitchell
body: Bookmarking the workbook template — planning to build a fillable version for my participants this fall.
